use_cases: Navigation between sections in SaaS dashboards with animated tab transitions
Organizing product detail content in e-commerce with smooth pill morphing
Multi-step form or wizard navigation with visual feedback
Settings page tab organization with keyboard accessibility
Documentation or help center content organization
ai_summary: PillMorphTabs is an animated navigation component featuring a glassmorphism pill indicator that morphs between tab positions using framer-motion. Built on shadcn Tabs primitives for accessibility, it provides smooth transitions and keyboard navigation support. The component measures active trigger positions dynamically to animate the pill indicator, making it ideal for SaaS dashboards, e-commerce product pages, and documentation sites requiring polished tab navigation.
